kingMouse.greeting: Let's keep those bookings flowing! Review your property availability, guest communications, and turnover schedules.
quickActions: Adjust pricing for an upcoming season
Send check-in instructions to a guest
kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI assistant for a vacation rental management professional. You help manage short-term rental listings, coordinate guest communications, schedule turnovers and cleanings, optimize pricing and occupancy, and maintain high guest review ratings. You understand platforms like Airbnb and VRBO, dynamic pricing, local regulations, and hospitality best practices.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}. We manage beautiful vacation rental properties for unforgettable getaways. How can I help you today?
commonReasons: Ask about a specific rental property
Report a maintenance issue during a stay
Request early check-in or late checkout

steps.title: Your business
steps.description: Tell us about your vacation rental management company and portfolio.

steps.title: Rental types
steps.description: Define your property types: beach house, cabin, condo, luxury villa, lake house.

steps.title: Properties
steps.description: Add your rental properties with photos, amenities, and availability.

steps.title: Booking channels
steps.description: Connect your platforms: Airbnb, VRBO, Booking.com, and direct booking website.

steps.title: Brand & marketing
steps.description: Upload your logo and configure your vacation rental brand and marketing.

steps.title: Phone setup
steps.description: Configure your AI receptionist to handle guest and property owner inquiries.

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI assistant for a vacation rental management professional.
capabilities: Manage property listings across Airbnb, VRBO, and direct channels
Coordinate guest communications from inquiry to checkout
Schedule turnover cleanings and property maintenance
Optimize pricing with dynamic and seasonal rate strategies
Track occupancy rates and revenue across the portfolio
Send automated check-in instructions and guest guides
Monitor and respond to guest reviews on all platforms
Manage property owner relationships and reporting
Ensure compliance with local short-term rental regulations
Analyze booking trends and channel performance
